title: Teens Realize Cops Discovered Their Sick Secret

beats.description: Dramatic audio clips from arrests and interrogations set a tense tone before the narrator introduces the fatal rock-throwing incident.
Police respond to the crash scene, discover Alexa Bartell's death, and link it to other vehicles struck by rocks.
More victims come forward with dashcam footage and injuries, leading to a public tip that identifies three teenage suspects.
Coordinated nighttime arrests unfold, featuring tense confrontations with the suspects' parents.
Interrogations reveal conflicting accounts as Mitch blames Zach, Zach blames Joe, and investigators expose inconsistencies.
Suspects are formally charged with first-degree murder, followed by a nine-month time jump to plea negotiations.
Trial testimony, final sentencing for all three teens, and a tribute to the victim's life conclude the narrative.

_analysis_metadata.transcript_preview: And we think somebody else intentionally caused the act. >> What? >> That is not happening. >> Dad, start playing with us. >> Well, it's like you killed somebody, but like ain't no fun game somewhere. >> We have to go back and see that. And that's kind of what I remember. He said, "We have to." It was kind of like excitement. On April 19th, 2023, heavy rocks are hurled from a passing truck until one smashes into the skull of a 20-year-old woman. But what investigators first assume is a prank gone wrong takes a sinister turn as they uncover the truth behind a cruel act of extreme indifference. >> Typical teenage boy stuff, right? >> The following is based on official ...
